panels.description: Wide shot: Mr. Kirwin, a stern magistrate in 18th-century attire, points commandingly towards a shadowy doorway. 'I' stands in the foreground, face pale and gaunt, being escorted by guards. Dark, oppressive inn hallway architecture, dramatic high-contrast lighting.

bubbles.text: Bring him to the room. We shall see what his reaction reveals.

panels.description: Medium shot: 'I' approach an open wooden coffin in a dimly lit, cold room. The perspective is from behind the protagonist looking at the body. Heavy, somber atmosphere with dust motes dancing in a single shaft of moonlight.

Close-up: The face of 'I', eyes wide with raw agony and horror, leaning over the coffin. Tears streaming down cheeks. Shadows obscure the features of the deceased Henry Clerval to emphasize the protagonist's emotional collapse.

bubbles.text: Have my murderous machinations deprived you also, my dearest Henry, of life?!

panels.description: Wide shot: A desaturated, bleak view of a prison cell. 'I' is lying on a wretched, thin straw mattress. A small barred window at the top casts cold, thin light onto the stone floor. Mr. Kirwin stands by the door, looking down with a mix of pity and suspicion.

bubbles.text: I lay for two months on the point of death, waking from a fever dream to this wretched dungeon.
